root_cause: MPI process- check 1 line ROs
corrective_action: Training, selling off MPI
expected_result: June 2026

root_cause: Getting work in progress through the shop
corrective_action: Hire more technicians
expected_result: May 2026

root_cause: Using Aftermarket parts
corrective_action: Getting the dealer to use Genuine or ASP parts- showing the dealership the opportunities in the drive and trying to get them to convert to using mitsubishi parts.  price comparisons
expected_result: Ongoing as I have contiuned discussions with the GM on loyalty

root_cause: There isn't a consistent process to offer accessories.
corrective_action: Spoke with Khaled and Glen about the opportunity to increase accy sales with some focus. Display in the showroom & offering small accessories to start.
expected_result: Follow up on the next visit to get buy in and commitment to implement a process.

root_cause: Driving increased service traffic and frequency of visits.  Work with SA on selling recommendations
corrective_action: Diamond Care Lite enrollment- dealer enrolled last month and completed DMS connection.  Focus on service recommendations and increasing close rates
expected_result: Work with dealership on capitalizing on increased service traffic.  Each visit follow up on MPIs, recommendations, pricing and selling recommendations

root_cause: DP doesn't allow accessorization of new cars/display units
corrective_action: Discussed the possibility of selling accessories in the service lane.  Displaying quick add ons, such as cargo nets, etc.
expected_result: Jeremy seemed open to the idea.  Will follow up on future visits to see if we can put a strategy together for implementation

root_cause: Low volume/service drive traffic
corrective_action: Pitching Affinitiv Program in April to increase conquest customers.
expected_result:
Meeting set for week of April 13th with GM and Amy Steeves with Affinitiv.  Will follow up after the meeting for next steps
Update- Jeremy did not sign up for Affinitiv.  even after being offered a free trial period for 3 months

root_cause: P&A is forecasted to end the month at only 41%.
corrective_action: Use the various customer list, such the list produced from MiServiceView to call and schedule customers.  you can filter to inactive customers and call customers who have a free oil change.  many of these customer just do not know they have a 2-year maintenance program.
expected_result: Expect to see increase service business and revenue.  this leads to additional parts and accessory sales.

root_cause: Outstanding recalls.  370 outstanding IVI and rear strut recalls are outstanding.
corrective_action: Use the various customer lists supplied to call and schedule customers.  e-reports gives a list specific to recalls.
expected_result: Increased revenue and service business

root_cause: Month end forecast is showing achievement of only 61%.  Low achievement mirrors service and parts business.
corrective_action:
Discussion of several actions to increase aftersales business include:
1) pulling the customer list of inactive customers
2) recalls - both IVI and rear strut, call and schedule
3) promotions - utilize the discounts offered
expected_result: Achievement of increased aftersales business and the P&A objective

root_cause: EV certification needs to completed by the service advisor by the due date of 11/11.  if EV certification is not completed by the due date, the dealership will not qualify for incentives, such as MDR.
corrective_action: Marcus needs a MDE ID# ASAP so we can get the online courses completed to achieve EV certification.
expected_result: Completion will lead to EV certification and continue incentives

root_cause: Accessory purchases are not achieving objective - this aligns with aftersales business.
corrective_action: Discussion with Keely and Roger on the subject and to use the accessories for CSI.  Follow up discussion with Jeremy on the subject.
expected_result: Enhanced pleased customers who would otherwise may not come back to Long Lewis.

root_cause: MPI penetration is showing 58.3%.  The MPI protects Long Lewis, but also gives you the ability to recommend service and increase revenue.
corrective_action: Keely has stated the MPI penetration should be much higher.  Previous reviews showed the MPI was printed on the customer RO.  Keely needs to pull those RO's identified on the database as not showing a MPI, make a copy of the RO showing the MPI is on the RO.  This would show the data is incorrect.  We would still need to identify the source of the data.
expected_result: Ultimately reporting would reflect MPI penetration with higher numbers.

root_cause: Parts & Accessory is tracking to be at 55% this month end.  This is the lowest in the district.  Aligns with service business volume.
corrective_action: One solution discussed was pulling or using the customer list from MiServiceView to identify inactive customers.  Identify from this group who has the 2-year maintenance program, or a recall.  Call to schedule the customer for service to increase business volume and P&A.
expected_result: Business volume increased with increased P&A by the end of October.

root_cause: Email capture rate is low penetration at 72%.  Need to capture the customer's email address for increase for repeat & referral business.
corrective_action: Train the service advisor to get the customer's email address and record it on every repair order.
expected_result: Expect to see higher email capture rates within 2 months.  Leading to additional service business.

root_cause: EV certification.  The technician and the service advisor needs to compete EV certification courses by 11/11.  if the dealership does not complete EV certification requirements by the due data, then the dealership will not be eligible for incentives, this includes MDR.
corrective_action:
Technician needs to complete all required courses for EV certification.  This includes an online class requirement.  All classes have been communicated to Khaled.  
Service Advisor needs to complete all online EV certification courses by the due date.  List of class have been forwarded to Khaled.
expected_result: Completion of EV certification by due date, by the technician and service advisor - leading to the dealership being EV certified.

root_cause: RO review showed for newer RO's the punch times were showing.  However for newer RO's technical punch times were not available or visible.  We used the system to look for technical punch times.
corrective_action: Input technical punch times for all repair orders per requirement of warranty policy.  Train the technician how to input the technical times and notes on the system.
expected_result: Expect to see all repair orders have technical punch times per warranty policy.  This should be completed within the month.

root_cause: MPI penetration on the report is showing 55.5%.  This needs to be higher to promote additional service business.
corrective_action: Keely is investigating the data the report is using.  I sent the raw data dump of all RO's used for the report.  Keely will investigate and identify if my data shows an MPI was not completed, however her records (RO) indicates a MPI was completed.
expected_result: Expected results from this data analysis will show MPI's are completed on all RO's.  Timeline for this action is 30 days, or the end of October.

root_cause: Service retention is showing 46.2% for the month of August.  This needs to be higher for repeat & referral service business.
corrective_action: To increase to a higher retention level we discussed using the customer list produced from MiServiceView.  Keely works this list now.  In order to increase retention pull inactive customers with a 2-year maintenance program in effect and call to schedule them in.
expected_result: Expected result is to see higher retention levels for customers who have not come in for service.  Expected results should be visible with two months.

root_cause: EV certification - this is a requirement of 50% of active technicians.  Initial report showed less then 50% were EV certified.
corrective_action: Keely identified a lube technician incorrectly coded as a full service technician.  This has been corrected.
expected_result: Long Lewis is EV certified for service technicians.

root_cause: Not achieving CSI.  Not getting surveys submitted.
corrective_action: Call the customers to submit the survey and ensure process for service advisor communicates the survey to customers at check out.
expected_result: Achieve CSI and increase business

root_cause: Claim submitted and was not responded to within the time limit to show maintenance records after the technician wrote issue was due to sludge.  this remark requires maintenance records.
corrective_action: Region could not approve after time passed.
expected_result: time was passed was explained to the service manager and warranty administrator

root_cause: CSI below achievement.  Long lewis had requested removal of a survey that was bringing down their score.  However after denial I sent a request to upload pics, additional reasoning.  I never got a response back.  However this was brought up again during my visit.  I asked if they did what was requested.  However no response again.  I sent the email again what was required with no response.
corrective_action: the month is over - June.  No action available at this time.  continue to offer customer service during service event.  communicate the survey.
expected_result: Achieve CSI target.

root_cause: Technician training.  Complete CORE technician training.
corrective_action: A report of available training (core and specialized) was emailed to Jeremy and Keely.  The report identifies by Technician name and what is completed and not completed.
expected_result: Trained technicians to efficiently work on Mitsubishi vehicles.

root_cause: Missed recalls when the vehicle was in the dealership for service.
corrective_action: Pull up the super screen on every vehicle to identify recalls, promotion, etc. on the vehicle
expected_result: Recall completion and higher customer satisfaction, since the customer does not have to come back in again for the recall

root_cause: Placing order for bulk oil and brake pads to avoid future prices increases and take advantage of achieved rebates.
corrective_action: Placing orders and schedule delivery on a later date for bulk oil, place orders for pads to take advantage of rebates of 10% earned.
expected_result: Pricing savings.
